transcript: Well, Bernie in Brighton, you're on KBIG 1090 with Irv and Joe.
[laughing] I don't think so! Ernie, how are ya?
Pretty good, thanks. Evenin'. Um... I just wanted to share with you, maybe, a conversation I had with Red Miller, recently.

[slightly wavering pitch] I had spoken to him in the past about Mark Gastineau, and the fact that.. you know, that man knew what was going on on both sides of the football. Uh... we started talking about Otis King... [heavy pitch wobbling] and then... and then he... [scramble]
Got a real bad connection, here. Ernie, please call back. Terrible connection. Let's go right to the phones...
